---
title: "Portfolio"
listing:
  contents: assignments
  sort: "date asc"
  fields: [title, date]
---

Welcome!  
This is my portfolio for learning **R, data analysis, GitHub, and Quarto**.

## Course Lessons

- Introduction to Literate Analysis Using Quarto 
[Data wrangling and cleaning](assignments/a01_quarto_literate_analysis.html)
- Tidy Data
- Cleaning and Wrangling data
- Data Visualization
